Appearances:
Plaintiff Jack Lapidos is present. Represented by Matt Meyer.
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alixndria Fogel is present.
Attorney Jessica Bogo appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of AUG-25-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
